name: private-ai-assistant
description: Local and Online AI Assistant with multi-agent orchestration and tools

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm audit fix --force && npm install --prefix backend && npm audit fix --force --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend --legacy-peer-deps && npm audit fix --force --prefix frontend --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['backend/test_database.db', 'backend/test_database.db-shm', 'backend/test_database.db-wal'].forEach(f => fs.existsSync(f) && fs.unlinkSync(f))" && playwright test
scripts.coverage: npm run coverage:backend && npm run coverage:frontend
